ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "total_docks" INTEGER /* Total number of docks available at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the station is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Last time the station status was updated */,
  "maintenance_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance team responsible for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_maintenance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_team_id") REFERENCES bikes ("maintenance_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of the bike (e.g., standard, electric) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, in use, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the bike */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the bike is located */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the bike */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level for electric bikes */,
  "maintenance_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance team responsible for the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_maintenance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_team_id") REFERENCES bike_maintenance ("maintenance_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the user is most active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the weather condition is recorded */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the season is recorded */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the season */,
  "average_humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the holiday is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holidays_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "working_days" (
  "workingday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each working day status */,
  "workingday_name" TEXT /* Name of the working day status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the working day status */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the working day status is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the working day status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workingday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_working_days_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes */,
  "available_docks" INTEGER /* Number of available docks */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was recorded */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the station status is recorded */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if maintenance is needed at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_status_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance team responsible for the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_maintenance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_team_id") REFERENCES bikes ("maintenance_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the access was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the feedback was provided */,
  "suggested_improvements" TEXT /* Suggested improvements by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES city_operations ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_operations" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "num_stations" INTEGER /* Number of stations in the city */,
  "num_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of bikes in the city */,
  "average_daily_trips" INTEGER /* Average number of daily trips in the city */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance operations */,
  "city_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city manager */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  "next_audit_due" TEXT /* Date of the next audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_operations_city_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
